titleStmt.title: SII 41.5: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 5. (A.R. No. 5 of 1905.) Kīḻūr, Tirukkoyilur Taluk, South Arcot District.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the Vīraṭṭāṉēśvara temple.
Damaged and incomplete. Begins with the praśasti commencing with “Tirumaṉṉivaḷara” etc. Stops after mentioning Tirukkōvalūr in (Kuṟukkai)-kūṟṟam, a district of Jananātha-vaḻanādu alias Milāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟceyap
pāvaiyuñ cirttaṉiccelviyuṉ taṉpeWritten as ‘e’run teviyarāki
Iṉpuṟa neṭutiyaruḻiyuḷḷiṭaituṟaiṉāṭum tuṭarvaṉa velippaṭarvaṉavā
ciyum cuḷḷicūḻmatiṭkoḷḷip pākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇmaṇ
ṇaikkaṭakkamumporukaṭaliḻattarayartamuṭiyum Āṅkavarteviyaroṅkeḻi
lmuṭiyumuṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavaṉ vaitta cuntaramuṭiyum Intiraṉāra
mum teṇṭicaiyiḻamaṇṭalam muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaiy keraḷar muṟai
ymaiyi cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻmuṭiyum ceṅkatirmālai caṅkatiruve
lailperuṅkāval palpaḻantivum ceruviṟciṉavil Irupattorukāl Aracarkaḷaikaṭṭa paracu
rāmaṉ melvaruñ cāntimattivaraṇ karuti yiruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika
muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉaḷap perumpukaḻoṭupiṭi Ilaṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum
avaṉavaṉetik kulapperumalaikaḷum vikkirama virarcakkarak koṭṭamumutir vaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamuṅ kā
miṭaivaḷaiy nāmaṇaik koṇaiyum veñciṉa virarpañcapaḷḷiyum pācaṭaip paḻaṉamācuṇi teca
mum Ayarvil vaṇkiṟttiyāti nakaravayiṟ cantiraṉ tolkula (kula)ttintira(ti)rataṉai vaḷaiyamark ka
ḷattukkiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palaca(ta)ṉat toṭuniṟai kulataṉak kuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñ ce(ṭṭanañ ce)ṟimu
ḷai Oṭṭa viṣayamum pūcuracer nal(ṟ)kocalaināṭum taṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉai Aḻittu vaṇṭu
ṟaicolai taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇuṟat tākki tikkaṇa kirttitak kaṇalāṭamu
m kovin=tacantaṉ māviḻin=toṭata
ṅkātacāral vaṅkāḷa tecamum toṭuka
ṭaṟ caṅkuvoṭṭal mayipālaṉai veñ
camar viḷākat tañcuvitta(ra)ruḷi Oṇṭi
ṟalyāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum
nittila(ṇa)ṉeṭuṅ kaṭaluttiralāṭamum
tirttaṟ ceṟipuṉaṟ kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuviṟ
celutti caṅkirāmavijaiyor tuṅkapanmanā
taraiyaṉai vākaiyum porukaṭaṟkum pakkarioṭum
rimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya Iruneti piṟakkamum A
kar nakar portoḻil vācalil viccātirate
moyttoḷi puṉaimaṇipputavamuṅkaṉama
mum niṟai śrīvijaiyamum
yumvaṉ malaiyūreyiṟṟoṉma
cūḻmāyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅkāva
kāppuṟuniṟai puṉalmāppāḷa
liṅkamum viḷappantūruṭaivaḷaippa
pukaḻtalait takkolamum
kamum kalāmutir kaṭun
ḻil māṉakkavāra
porutaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa
rājentracoḻa tevarkku yā
milāṭāṉa jaṉaṉātavaḷanāṭṭu
kūṟṟattu tirukkovalūr
mahātevarkku Incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 41.5 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
